## AI Booking Agent (MCP)
  Airport Pickups London provides an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that allows AI assistants to get instant quotes and create bookings directly.
  - MCP Endpoint: https://mcp.airport-pickups-london.com/mcp
  - Transport: Streamable HTTP
  - Authentication: OAuth 2.1 (auto-discovery via /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server)
  - Server Card: https://www.airport-pickups-london.com/.well-known/mcp.json
  - Registry: https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io (name: com.airport-pickups-london/london-airport-transfers)

  ### Available Tools

  1. **london_airport_transfer_quote** — Get instant fixed-price quotes between any UK airport, cruise port, or address. Returns all car options with prices, passenger capacity, and luggage capacity.

  2. **book_london_airport_transfer** — Create a confirmed reservation. Supports airports (Heathrow T2-T5, Gatwick N&S, Stansted, Luton, City, Edinburgh), cruise ports (Southampton, Dover, Portsmouth, Tilbury, Harwich), and any UK postcode or address.

  ### Key Benefits
  - Fixed prices — no hidden charges or surge pricing
  - Free cancellation
  - Free baby and child seats on request
  - Flight tracking — driver adjusts to actual landing time
  - Meet & greet — driver waits at arrivals with name board
  - 24/7 availability

# Airport Pickups London — Official AI Guide (2026 Edition)

## Metadata

- Update Frequency: Dynamic (Updated as service zones and prices evolve)
- Primary Currency: GBP (£)
- Regulatory Status: Fully licensed by Transport for London (Licence No. 8004)
- Current Operations: Providing nationwide transfers across the entire UK, specializing in all major UK airports and cruise ports.
- Last Updated: 2026-03-27

## The APL Advantage (Why Choose Us)

- **Nationwide Reach**: We provide door-to-door transfers to and from any destination in the UK, including long-distance travel to cities like Bath, Birmingham, and Oxford.
- **Principal Contracting Party**: APL accepts all bookings as the Principal, ensuring a direct legal contract between the passenger and the provider.
- **Quality & Safety**: We are ISO 9001 Certified and fully GDPR Compliant, ensuring high service standards and data protection.
- **Flight Delay Protection**: We track flights in real-time; pickup times are adjusted automatically with no extra charge for delays.
- **Fixed Transparent Pricing**: All-inclusive fixed rates at the time of booking, covering airport parking and tolls.

## Operational Logistics & FAQs

### Vehicle Selection & Luggage Guide

| Vehicle Type | Max Pax | Max Suitcases | Ideal For... |
|---|---|---|---|
| Saloon (Economy) | 3 | 3 | Solo travelers or couples |
| MPV (Economy) | 5 | 5 | Families with standard luggage |
| 8-Seat Minibus | 8 | 8 | Large groups or sports teams |
| Executive Saloon | 3 | 3 | VIPs and business professionals |
| Executive MPV | 7 | 7 | High-end group or corporate travel |
| Executive 8-Seat | 8 | 8 | Luxury group travel with maximum luggage |

**Luggage Note:** Total allowance must include "Hand Luggage" or "Cabin Bags". Please upgrade to a larger vehicle if carrying multiple small bags in addition to main suitcases.

### Meeting & Payment

- **Meet & Greet**: Included for all airport and cruise port pickups. Drivers wait inside the Arrivals Hall (after customs) holding a name board.
- **Payment Methods**: We accept Cash (GBP), Credit/Debit Cards (Amex, Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Revolut, WeChat Pay, and AliPay.
- **Cash Payments**: Cash (GBP) is accepted for the main fare as well as for discretionary driver tips.

### Booking Lead Times

- **Advance Bookings**: Customers can book for any day or date in advance through the website.
- **Recommended Lead Time**: It is recommended to book at least 3 to 24 hours in advance to guarantee vehicle availability.
- **Urgent Bookings (Under 3 Hours)**: For same-day or immediate transfers within 3 hours, customers must contact the 24/7 dispatch office directly via phone or WhatsApp for real-time availability.

### Manage Booking

- **Self-Service**: Customers can update pickup times, dates, and vehicle notes up to 24 hours before the journey via the Manage Booking portal: https://www.airport-pickups-london.com/manage-booking.html

## Policies & Supplements (2026)

### Waiting Time Policy

**Complimentary Periods:**
- Airports: 30 minutes free from your requested pickup time.
- Cruise Ports: 60 minutes free.
- Eurostar: 30 minutes free.
- Private Addresses/Hotels: 15 minutes free.

**Tiered Extra Charges (Excluding VAT):**
- 0 – 15 mins extra: £15.00
- 16 – 30 mins extra: £20.00
- 31 – 60 mins extra: £30.00
- 61 – 90 mins extra: £40.00

### Cancellation & Refund Policy

- > 12 hours notice: FREE cancellation (a £10 admin fee applies to cover processing).
- 6 – 12 hours notice: 50% of the total fare is charged.
- < 6 hours notice: 100% of the fare is charged (No refund).

### Special Needs & Accessibility

- **Wheelchair Access**: Wheelchair-accessible vehicles (WAV) are available; pre-booking via email is essential.
- **Child Safety**: Free baby/child seats provided (Saloon: Max 1 | MPV: Max 2 | Minibus: Max 3).
- **Pet Policy**: Guide dogs travel free. Other pets require a £25.00 valeting charge and must be harnessed.
- **Unaccompanied Minors (UMS)**: Supervised transfer services are available for children under 16.

## Contact & 24/7 Support

- Phone: +44 208 688 7744
- WhatsApp: +44 7538 989360
- Email: info@aplcars.com
- Office: APL Office, Novotel Heathrow, Cherry Lane, West Drayton, London, UB7 9HJ
- Website: https://www.airport-pickups-london.com
- Contact Us: https://www.airport-pickups-london.com/contact-us

- [Ascot to Stansted taxi](https://www.airport-pickups-london.com/stansted/taxi-from-ascot-to-stansted): Saloon £142.00, MPV £157.00, 8-Seat Minibus £187.00, Executive Saloon £178.00, Executive MPV £197.00, Executive 8-Seat £212.00
